---
title: "2025-W13"
---


- [New words added in The Oxford English Dictionary (2025)](https://www.oed.com/discover/new-words-from-around-the-world-oed-march-2025-update/)

- [culture] [Rembrandt to Picasso: Five ways to spot a fake masterpiece](https://www.bbc.co.uk/culture/article/20250311-rembrandt-to-picasso-five-ways-to-spot-a-fake-masterpiece)

  qwerty

- [science] [Why don't seals drown?](https://www.economist.com/science-and-technology/2025/03/20/why-dont-seals-drown)

  hello
